The following is a list of the item(s)
observed altered effects: Non-corporeality, affinity for specific
human behavior, and minor physical movement (waving its arm).
Multiple simultaneous incarnations of this item have been
observed. Whether these are independent Altered ltems acting
uniformly or replicated instances of Al48 is unknown.
BACKGROUND:
How the item(s) originally arrived in the Oldest House is unknown.
It was first discovered sitting in the Director’s chair and was
immediately contained in a Panopticon cell. The next day, an agent
noticed two additional figurines had appeared. Hours later, all three
vanished. The item(s) has been sighted throughout the Bureau,
appearing while agents perform _tasks. It is theorized
that fulfilling certain unknown criteria will encourage the item(s) to
appear.
Present location is unknown.

ANTECEDENTES:
Se desconoce cómo llegaron originalmente los artículos a la Casa Más Antigua.
Fue descubierto por primera vez sentado en la silla del Director y fue
inmediatamente contenido en una celda Panopticon. Al día siguiente, un agente
Noté que habían aparecido dos figuras adicionales. Horas más tarde, los tres
desapareció. Los artículos han sido avistados en toda la Oficina,
apareciendo mientras los agentes realizan _tareas. esta teorizado
